# 🌐 Third-Party Tools

Tools cloned or adapted from external sources.

```
third-party/
└── cloned-tool/
    ├── README.md         # Attribution + usage notes
    ├── [source files]    # The actual tool
    └── LICENSE           # Original license (must be preserved)
```

**Rules:**
- Always preserve the original LICENSE and attribution
- Note the source repo URL in the README
- If you modify a third-party tool, document what changed
